description: Style Note Super soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game! Product Details Blue wallet that has a flap with a buttoned closure and a metallic keyhole design with branding, zipped pocket, three card holders and a coin pocket with a buttoned closure on the left, two insert pockets with seven card holders and an id card holder on the right, zipped pocket at the back and a floral design on the front Material and Care Vintage leather Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Dimensions: 9.5 cm x 19 cm
